loops.title: Post-agreement email template — HubSpot workflow
loops.description: Auto-triggered email on agreement signed: pre-announces mentor call, payment date, portal link.

loops.title: 7 DC handoff fields in HubSpot
loops.description: Structured handoff: parent story, about son, parent type, son engagement, starting energy, objections raised, brand affinity.

loops.title: Stripe retry timing change to 11am AEST
loops.description: Move Stripe payment retry from overnight to 11am AEST when parent bank accounts are more likely to have funds.

loops.title: Zapier 5-zap spec — prevent Stripe/HubSpot recurrence
loops.description: Spec out 5 critical Zapier automations to prevent recurring Stripe/HubSpot sync issues and broken auth.

loops.title: Family Bible portal integration spec
loops.description: Define how Family Bible content (session quotes, milestones, growth data) pulls from the parent portal into the physical book.

loops.title: Mentor hiring pipeline — TestGorilla automation
loops.description: Build automated pipeline: SEEK/Meta ad → TestGorilla screening → auto-invite → video interview → trial session.

loops.title: Norri W1 payment tracker — weekly auto-email
loops.description: Automated weekly email to Norri showing payment status for all families in her microowner portfolio.

loops.title: Fireflies auto-matching pipeline — 3am cron
loops.description: Cron job at 3am to auto-match Fireflies transcripts to HubSpot contacts and tag DC calls for scoring.

loops.title: Portal recording integration for Family Bible
loops.description: Enable session recordings to be accessible via portal and flagged for Family Bible inclusion.

loops.title: Alicia Nation (Lincoln) — needs close + payment
loops.description: Alicia showed strong interest on DC, agreement sent but payment not yet confirmed. Follow up to lock in.

loops.title: Brooke Beveridge (Joby) — needs close + payment
loops.description: Brooke's son Joby matched with mentor. Agreement sent, awaiting payment confirmation to start W1.

loops.title: DC Scoring Pipeline timeout fix
loops.description: SIEL scoring pipeline timing out at 300s — needs chunking or async processing for large transcript batches.
